raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "exhortation urging immediate self-abuse or self-contempt as a temporary imperative before an impending shift to self-respect",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the soul possesses agency to choose self-abuse or self-respect",
    "a finite window exists during which self-respect will become appropriate or possible",
    "self-abuse is advisable or necessary in the present interval",
    "the transition to self-respect is inevitable and approaching"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent as a paradoxical imperative linking present self-contempt to future self-regard, though reliant on unstated temporal and metaphysical assumptions",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the recipient accepts the premise of an imminent end to the period of self-abuse, values preparatory self-criticism as a path to later self-respect, and operates within a framework (e.g., spiritual or therapeutic) where such directed self-address is meaningful",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is interpreted as endorsing literal ongoing self-harm without temporal limit, the assumed deadline for self-respect does not exist, or the audience lacks the contextual beliefs required to treat the command as metaphorical or preparatory"
}
